prompt.content: I want to understand the relationship between plan data allowance and actual data consumption for prepaid and postpaid subscriptions separately. Calculate the average daily data consumption (MB) for subscribers on low (<=10GB), mid (10-80GB), and unlimited plans during 2025 by account_type. Plans should be active at the time of use, and days where the usage was zero should be excluded. Use the tables subscribers for account_type, subscriber_plans for active plans, subscription_plans for plan attributes, and data_usage_daily for usage data. Please provide SQLite code to perform this analysis and report the averages to 2 decimals.

rubrics.name: Determines the average daily usage for Low data, postpaid plans to be... (ver_b02896a65b2647d8bcaf1b076b62cfaf)

messages.content: Determines the average daily usage for Low data, postpaid plans to be 3390.87MB +/- 0.05MB.

rubrics.name: Determines the average daily usage for Low data usage, prepaid plans to be... (ver_c040d0d5553d43db8d2444fd3b62bc57)

messages.content: Determines the average daily usage for Low data usage, prepaid plans to be 3162.86MB +/- 0.05MB.

rubrics.name: Determines the average daily usage for Mid data usage, postpaid plans to be... (ver_c8bf1f34456841bfb30f232580b27821)

messages.content: Determines the average daily usage for Mid data usage, postpaid plans to be 3188.51MB +/- 0.05MB.

rubrics.name: Determines the average daily usage for Unlimited data usage, postpaid plans to... (ver_3287a4b68fed4f639ca884d90407bdf8)

messages.content: Determines the average daily usage for Unlimited data usage, postpaid plans to be 3027.62MB +/- 0.05MB.

rubrics.name: Determines the average daily usage for Unlimited data usage, prepaid plans to... (ver_05628647b3a048cc98817b5961907899)

messages.content: Determines the average daily usage for Unlimited data usage, prepaid plans to be 3732.38MB +/- 0.05MB.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
plan_type account_type  avg_data_consumed_mb
      Low     postpaid               3390.87
      Low      prepaid               3162.86
      Mid     postpaid               3188.51
Unlimited     postpaid               3027.62
Unlimited      prepaid               3732.38

```sql
WITH merged AS (
  SELECT
    d.subscriber_id,
    d.usage_date,
    d.data_consumed_mb,
    s.account_type,
    sp.activation_date,
    sp.contract_end_date,
    p.data_allowance_gb
  FROM data_usage_daily d
  JOIN subscribers s ON s.subscriber_id = d.subscriber_id
  JOIN subscriber_plans sp ON sp.subscriber_id = d.subscriber_id
  JOIN subscription_plans p ON p.plan_id = sp.plan_id
  WHERE
    d.usage_date BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-12-31'
    AND d.usage_date >= sp.activation_date
    AND ((d.usage_date <= sp.contract_end_date) OR (sp.contract_end_date IS NULL))
    AND d.data_consumed_mb > 0
  ),

classified AS (
  SELECT
    subscriber_id,
    account_type,
    data_consumed_mb,
    CASE
      WHEN data_allowance_gb = 'unlimited' THEN 'Unlimited'
      WHEN CAST(data_allowance_gb as REAL) <= 10 THEN 'Low'
      WHEN CAST(data_allowance_gb as REAL) > 10 AND CAST(data_allowance_gb as REAL) <= 80 THEN 'Mid'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS plan_type
  FROM merged
  )
  
SELECT 
  plan_type,
  account_type,
  ROUND(AVG(data_consumed_mb), 2) AS avg_data_consumed_mb
FROM classified
WHERE
  plan_type IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY plan_type, account_type;
```
